updateMetadata.rationale: persist risk and flow decisions for prompt reuse; v1.1 adds criticality and acknowledged_by fields, formalizes expires_at with severity-based defaults
updateMetadata.expectedGain: lower prompt fatigue, stronger auditability, expiry-aware session checks, and criticality-based prioritization
updateMetadata.potentialImpact: decision expiry and context-hash logic becomes mandatory; expired decisions surface warnings at session start
